privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database contains 11 tables: Artist, Album, Track, MediaType, Genre, Playlist, PlaylistTrack, Invoice, InvoiceLine, Customer, and Employee. The schema includes 11 foreign key relationships total: Album→Artist, Track→Album, Track→MediaType, Track→Genre, PlaylistTrack→Playlist, PlaylistTrack→Track, Employee→Employee (self-referential), Customer→Employee, Invoice→Customer, and InvoiceLine references both Invoice and Track. The task requires a minimum of 9 tables (82% of total) and 7 FK relationship edges (64% of total) to be represented in the ERD. The schema is based on the official Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) which represents a digital media store with music catalog and sales infrastructure. Output must be saved to ~/Desktop/chinook_erd.drawio with PNG export to ~/Desktop/chinook_erd.png, organized into at least 2 diagram pages.
